---
title: Sliders and Scrollbars
---

```{r}
library(gglite)
```

Sliders and scrollbars allow users to zoom and pan through data.

## Slider on x

```{r}
df = data.frame(x = 1:100, y = cumsum(rnorm(100)))
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_line() |>
  slider_of('x')
```

## Slider on y

```{r}
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_line() |>
  slider_of('y')
```

## Slider on both axes

```{r}
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_point() |>
  slider_of('x') |>
  slider_of('y')
```

## Scrollbar on x

```{r}
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_line() |>
  scrollbar_of('x')
```

## Scrollbar on y

```{r}
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_line() |>
  scrollbar_of('y')
```

## Scrollbar on both axes

```{r}
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_point() |>
  scrollbar_of('x') |>
  scrollbar_of('y')
```

## Slider with a bar chart

```{r}
df = data.frame(x = paste0('Item ', 1:50), y = sample(1:100, 50))
g2(df, x = 'x', y = 'y') |>
  mark_interval() |>
  slider_of('x')
```
